_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Test hygiene — randomized test order, strict markers, dead-code & dep-hygiene gates (P1-CR-C)

steps.description: RED-first reproduce the test_safe_migrate IW_CORE_PER_WORKTREE_DB-leak failure; add pytest-randomly/vulture/deptry dev deps (regen uv.lock); bounded multi-seed sweep — make test-unit 3x (different seeds) + make test-integration 1x (one more seed), no more (the integration suite is slow; the QV gates re-run it); fix or quarantine each surfaced order-dependent failure (suite must end green under randomization, or fall back to -p no:randomly off-by-default with a filed follow-up); add --strict-markers to addopts + fix any typo'd markers; add [tool.vulture]/[tool.deptry] config + vulture_whitelist.py + make dead-code/make dep-check (warn-only) + append to quality: + .PHONY + a non-failing step in .github/workflows/test-quality.yml's lint-typecheck job; fix tests/unit/test_safe_migrate.py's 2 agent-context tests (read orch/db/safe_migrate.py for the exact env var(s); fix in the test, not prod); document the pytest-randomly recipe in tests/CLAUDE.md + skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md §2/§7/§8; update docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md §3/§5/§6/§9; run iw sync-skills; tick items 1.4/1.5/1.7 + §5 grouping + changelog in ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md; record tdd_red_evidence = the test_safe_migrate RED run. make quality must pass (warn-only steps non-failing) + targeted re-run of touched test files; do NOT also run make check / the full suites again — that's the QV gates' job.

Review S01: order-dependent failures genuinely fixed (test-isolation only, no behavioral changes) or correctly quarantined + follow-up filed; --strict-markers added + markers clean; vulture/deptry warn-only (do not block make quality / CI); the test_safe_migrate fix correct (passes in agent worktree AND CI; no prod-code change); uv.lock updated for all 3 deps; doc/plan/skill updates; iw sync-skills ran (diff .claude/skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md vs master); pytest-randomly recipe documented; no out-of-scope edits (no integration-gate fix, no hard-gate flip, no dead-code deletion pass).

Global review: suite robust to randomization (or off-by-default with a filed follow-up); make quality includes the warn-only steps without failing on them; .claude/skills/ in sync; make check passes; no scope creep.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Unit tests (now with pytest-randomly enabled — exercises randomization on this CR)
QV: Diff coverage (new/changed lines must be well-covered)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
